query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_rows, COUNT(DISTINCT priorityLevel) as priority_levels, SUM(CASE WHEN priorityLevel LIKE 'A%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as priority_A, SUM(CASE WHEN priorityLevel LIKE 'B%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as priority_B, SUM(CASE WHEN priorityLevel LIKE 'C%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as priority_C FROM accountPriors;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total_rows, COUNT(DISTINCT priorityLevel) as priority_levels, SUM(CASE WHEN priorityLevel LIKE 'A%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as priority_A, SUM(CASE WHEN priorityLevel LIKE 'B%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as priority_B, SUM(CASE WHEN priorityLevel LIKE 'C%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as priority_C FROM accountPriors;
